allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.omx"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.omx" -Recurse -Depth 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output "No ~/.omx directory" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.omxrc"\) { Write-Output "Found ~/.omxrc" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\omx"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\omx" -Recurse -Depth 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output "No ~/.config/omx" })

PowerShell($paths = @\(\); $cmd = \(Get-Command codex -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($cmd\) { $paths += "codex: $\($cmd.Source\)" }; $cmd2 = \(Get-Command omx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($cmd2\) { $paths += "omx: $\($cmd2.Source\)" }; if \($paths.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Output "Neither codex nor omx found in PATH" } else { $paths })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.codex"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.codex" -Recurse -Depth 3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length } else { Write-Output ".codex directory does NOT exist" })
